subcodes.first_line: O Rafi'! God willing, mayest thou ever abide, and continue to abide, beneath the sheltering shade of divine loving-kindness, serene and at rest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیع انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال در ظل عنایت رحمانیه ساکن و مستریح باشی
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
